semantic.role: Naming convention policy document for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Defines mandatory naming conventions for TypeScript interfaces (I prefix)
Defines mandatory naming conventions for test files (suffix .test.ts or .spec.ts)
Provides scope, constraint, severity, and reasoning for each rule
outOfScope: Naming conventions for other file types (e.g., components, utilities, configuration)
Architecture rules or structural guidelines beyond naming
Formatting or linting rules not related to file/identifier naming

English.purpose: This document establishes a consistent naming convention for the codebase to ensure readability and maintainability, especially across large monorepos.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for all developers contributing to the ArchSpine project. It serves as a reference for approved naming patterns to avoid style inconsistencies and confusion during code reviews.
key_takeaways: Internal TypeScript interfaces must be prefixed with 'I' (e.g., IUserRepository). This rule applies to files under src/types/**/*.ts and is enforced as a warning.
Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts. This rule applies to the tests directory and is enforced as an error.
Each rule includes its scope, constraint, severity level, and the reasoning behind it to promote understanding and compliance.
